title: Luraris
description: Lunaris is a modpack that add to the world more medieval activities such as farming, old weaponary, and a lot more.

For any help, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/KYaRtM2GaB).

#  🌙 Lunaris – Fantasy, RP & RPG Modpack 🌿

Lunaris is a fantasy modpack focused on RPGs, RPGs, and adventures, designed to offer an immersive and magical experience, alone or with friends. Explore a rich world populated by realistic animals, mysterious structures, RPG classes, powerful spells, and a comprehensive cooking system!

### 🔮 Magic, Classes, and Adventures
Choose your path among mages, paladins, archers, thieves, and more with the RPG Series mods. Become a unique hero, forge your role, and embark on adventures in a vibrant world.

###  🌾 Peaceful Life and Crafting
With Farmer's Delight and its many add-ons, cook a variety of dishes, brew drinks, cultivate fields, and decorate your farm. The **Let's Do] Bakery, Brewery, Vinery, Farm & Charm** mods enrich rural life for a calm and welcoming gameplay.

###  ⚙️ Fantasy Technology & Automation
The **Create** mod and its add-ons bring a touch of ingenuity to automate your harvests, cooking, or potion machines, while maintaining a medieval-fantasy style.

###  🦌 Wildlife, Seasons, and Living Nature
With **Naturalist**, **Serene Seasons**, and **Supplementaries**, nature is at the heart of the adventure: realistic animals, dynamic seasons, decorative objects, and structures to explore enrich every corner of the world.

### 🛡️ Customization & Aesthetics
Thanks to **Armourer's Workshop**, **Wavey Capes**, **Visuality**, **Watut**, and other visual mods, customize your appearance, feel the atmosphere, and observe a world that's as vibrant as ever.

### 🎮 A modpack perfect for sessions with friends
Designed for multiplayer RPGs, **Lunaris** combines storytelling, exploration, crafting, and combat in a poetic and stylized universe.
